hero.title: Custom Python Automation for Startups
hero.description_1: Your startup uses Make, Zapier, or Airtable to automate processes? At some point, you'll hit the limits: API caps, latency, exploding costs, impossible-to-debug workflows. That's where I step in.
hero.description_2: I build custom Python automations — scripts that replace your no-code tools and do the same job 10x faster, with zero external dependencies. From data pipelines to intelligent bots, I deliver production-grade systems that scale.

services.title: Services
services.description: I replace your limited no-code tools with custom Python scripts that are 10x faster, more reliable, and cheaper.
services.ctaDescription: I review your processes, identify what can be automated, and you keep the report no matter what. Zero commitment.

pipelines.title: Automated Data Pipelines
pipelines.description: Scraping, OCR, ETL — structured data delivered automatically. 10k+ pages scraped per hour.

bots.title: Custom Bots & Automation
bots.description: Telegram, Discord, Slack bots built to your specs. Turn 2 hours of manual work into 3 seconds.

scoring.title: Multi-criteria Lead Scoring
scoring.description: Statistical scoring with weighted median, time-decay analysis, and confidence metrics.

dashboards.title: Dashboards & Automated Reporting
dashboards.description: Real-time dashboards and automated reports that deliver insights without manual effort.

integrations.title: Custom API Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your tools together with custom integrations. Zero downtime over 30 days.

project.title: Case Studies
project.description: Real projects, real metrics. Each system is built for performance, reliability, and scale.

vintedsniper.title: Marketplace Intelligence Engine
vintedsniper.description: Scalable marketplace analysis engine with anti-bot bypass. Statistical scoring with weighted median, time-decay analysis, and seller confidence metrics. Processes 1000+ listings per batch with 95% deal accuracy.

viralcutter.title: AI Video Processing Pipeline
viralcutter.description: Open-source alternative to Opus Clip. Automated video segmentation and highlight extraction using AI. Processes long-form content into optimized short clips for social media distribution.

ortholyse.title: NLP-Powered Speech Analysis Tool
ortholyse.description: AI-powered orthographic analysis tool for automated text correction and linguistic pattern detection. Combines rule-based and statistical approaches for high-accuracy French language processing.

ocrproject.title: Intelligent Document Pipeline
ocrproject.description: Intelligent document processing pipeline leveraging OCR + Mistral AI for automated text extraction from invoices and contracts. 98%+ character recognition accuracy with batch processing. Turns 2 hours of manual data entry into 3 seconds.

xmonitor.title: Social Listening Bot
xmonitor.description: 24/7 Twitter/X monitoring automation with cookie-based session management and anti-detection. Dockerized for persistent deployment with automatic session recovery. Zero downtime over 30-day runs.

surebetbot.title: Real-time Data Pipeline
surebetbot.description: Real-time detection engine scanning data across 30+ sources. Multi-API failover architecture with automatic key rotation. Pushes actionable alerts via Telegram in under 2 seconds. ~500 req/min throughput.

contact.title: Start Your Automation
contact.description1: Ready to replace your limited no-code tools with custom Python scripts that are 10x faster?
contact.description2: Book a free 15-minute audit — I review your processes, identify what can be automated, and you keep the report no matter what.
contact.description3: Zero commitment. Let's find out what we can automate together.
